creator: zgabor@code.hu
text:
There is a command, gencat(1), which can generate message catalog
	files for use with the catopen/catgets/catclose(3) routines, to
	generate localised programs.  It's manual page is missing - as the
	manual page (eg: gencat(5)), which describes the format of gencat's
	source file.

How-To-Repeat: 
	man gencat :-(
